title: Vascon Engineers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Vascon Engineers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Vascon Engineers, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vascon Engineers:
Vascon Engineers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vascon Engineers!
